items.title: Bruno Marc sneakers, dress shoes, and boots fall as low as $20 at Amazon (Up to 54% off)
items.summary:
Alongside all of the other discounts we’ve covered, Amazon’s Big Spring Sale also includes a wide selection of deals on Bruno Marc shoes now priced from $20. One of the more unique offerings in the lineup include the brand’s Driving Penny Loafers at $29.99 Prime shipped. These have been slowly dropping in price over the last few months and are currently finding their footing (ha!) at $30. This marks an up to 30% drop since the $43 price they fetched back in December. While this style may not be at the top of everyone’s list, it’s a fashionable look that stands out from the crowd. You can cash in on these, plus loads of others down below.

items.summary:

One of the most notable markdowns I’m seeing is this G Gradual Sherpa Lined Sweatshirt at $19.99 Prime shipped. If you don’t have Prime, get a couple and you’ll pass the $35 minimum to score free shipping. While it is officially spring outside, consistently warm weather is still a ways off for many of us. That’s where a sweatshirt like this can come in handy, especially at this price point. Keep scrolling to find a whole lot more G Gradual markdowns priced from $8.

items.summary:
If you’re here, you’re likely very much aware that Amazon’s Big Spring Sale is alive and well. There are loads of deals to cash in on, but right here, right now we’re highlighting some TESSAN charging gear from $10. My favorite from the bunch comes in the form of its 3-in-1 20W USB-C Wall Charger with an integrated Apple Watch puck for $12.74 Prime shipped. This best price is on the white colorway, while others cost $15 to $17. The deal here is a drop from $15 and the price point marks a return to best Amazon offer we’ve seen. It’s pretty obvious what I like here, and that’s the integrated Apple Watch charging puck. This is paired with both USB-A and Type-C ports too. You can find many other TESSAN gear down below at up to 40% off.

items.summary:
One of the more affordable brands we keep an eye on at Amazon is JMIERR, and during the Big Spring Sale the prices are even better at up to 62% off. Our top pick are these Textured Shorts down at just $9.49 Prime shipped. Folks without Prime can score free shipping when checking out with at least $35 in their cart. These shorts arrived at Amazon back in late December for $25, but have since been dropping in price, spending quite a bit of time lately around $14 or so. Today’s offer slashes even more off, getting the cost down to only $9.50. Unlike a lot of bland looking styles, these pop with a textured design that helps them stand out from the pack. They look comfortable too. I personally own several JMIERR shirts and am actually wearing one as an undershirt right now. Head below to see our top picks.

items.title: Gaming PCs don’t have to be ugly: Fractal Design cases fall as low as $110 (Up to 31% off)
items.summary:
One of the things I love most about large scheduled sales like Big Spring, Prime Day, and beyond, is that you can often cash in on things that don’t frequently see discounts. Fractal Design gear is a perfect example if you ask me, and several of its great looking PC cases are priced from $110 right now. That’s right, you can cash in while gear is up to 31% off. My personal favorite, the Fractal Design North Chalk White Oak ATX Case is down at $123.99 right now. You’d usually need to fork over $155, which equates to a $31 discount. The only time we’ve spotted it less at Amazon was for a week back in January at $116. Outside of that, this is the second-best offer we’ve tracked on the style. I’m personally rocking an XL version of this case at my desk right now. You can find all the deals down below.

It’s a great opportunity to update/upgrade your cooking support, with a top pick being the Foodi Flip 8-in-1 Digital Air Fry Oven that has been cut down to $169.99 shipped. Down from $250 during this sale, you’re looking at a solid 32% markdown that cuts $80 from the tag, landing it down among some of its best prices that we have seen in the last six months. It can be flipped up when not in use to “save you 50% space,” and brings along the functionality to handle air frying, air roasting, air broiling, baking, toasting, dehydrating, keeping food warm, and a setting for bagels.

This budget-friendly model typically goes for $250, so you’re looking at a $70 discount here, which makes it even easier on your wallet. We’ve seen the 4GB RAM and 128GB storage variant go on sale plenty of times in the past – including a current $150 deal at Best Buy – but discounts on this higher-spec model have been far less common. Today’s offer brings this configuration to within $10 of its all-time low, making it a particularly solid value when you factor in that it includes both the stylus and the folio case right in the box. And the fact that it’s only $30 more than the base variant makes it a pretty good option to consider.

items.title: BUDI95 Monthly Quota Temporarily Adjusted To 200 Litres Starting 1 April 2026
